noticia.texto_resumido: The prominent debut this week is Alex Aster's Starside (Avon), ranking #1 on the New York Times and Publishers Weekly lists, #21 at USA Today . Other debuts this week are hardcovers by Ilona Andrews, Scott Reintgen, and Melissa K. Roehrich, and a trade paperback by Sarah Beth Durst.
